description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and hip roof combination, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and a sleek, geometric design. The front facade includes a wide staircase leading up to a main entryway, flanked by glass railings and a landscaped area with greenery. The exterior is finished in a mix of dark and light panels, with wood-textured cladding on the upper level and smooth concrete or stucco on the lower. A swimming pool and patio area are visible on one side, while the opposite side features a double garage with driveway access. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, providing privacy and a clear boundary from the street. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with large windows, a mix of dark and light exterior panels, a wide staircase, and a poolside patio. The design is sleek and geometric, with wood accents and a double garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, large glass windows, and pool area with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the double garage, wood-textured upper facade, and a landscaped patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical window arrangement and a clear view of the upper and lower stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, dark exterior panels, and additional balcony space.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with symmetrical rows and some asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a recessed glass entry door, flanked by glass railings and minimalistic landscaping
